name: Sweet and Sour Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Green pepper, cut into Squares
1 can (8 oz) pineapple chunks, in Its own juice, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef, 1/4 cup Steak Sauce, bread crumbs and egg; shape into 24 meatballs.
2. Drain pineapple chunks, reserving juice.
3. Mix remaining Steak Sauce with reserved juice.
4. Thread meatballs, pineapple, green pepper, cherry tomatoes and mushrooms on 6 metal skewers.
5. Grill or broil kabobs, 4 to 6 inches from heat source, for 10 to 15 minutes or until done, turning and brushing with Steak Sauce Mixture frequently.
6. Serve with rice bedding. Makes 6 servings.
